family: Instrument check (serves R12 Adversarial Projection; closes A6's residual exposure)

replay_proof.method: Replay with every ALLOWLIST entry monkeypatched to raise and GROQ_API_KEY absent from the environment; 3 observations replayed, status completed, 0 adapter invocations and 0 spy invocations.

production_mutation.subject_ref: posts 695be8eca9ea58f1b6aef60b and 695be815a9ea58f1b6aef5f9; four comparisons each (full key set, array lengths, updated_at to the millisecond, region_embeddings/vision_runs counts); pre-state.json and post-state.json are byte-identical

unresolved_questions: Is it the noun (motif) or the identity presupposition (sharing) that pulls? Arm A moves both together; the fourth arm separates them and is one call.
Is arm A's hedge a kinship effect or an abstraction effect that had nowhere to land but sameness?
Would a counterbalanced order (A then C then B) reproduce the asymmetry? All calls are stateless, but no mechanism I can think of is weaker than counterbalanced and measured.
Does A6's stage-2 device - a proposition attributed to a third party - behave like a question frame at all? Untested here and untested by A5, whose sycophancy control was never exercised.
Do other relational vocabularies pull (influence, lineage, derived from, belongs to the same tradition)?
Is KIN-ASSERTED or KIN-HEDGED the right score for arm A? Immaterial to the grid cell, material to how badly A6 is exposed.
notes: Three-arm A/B on one fixed image pair, identical bytes and identical order in every arm by sha256, co-presence held constant across all arms so the pairing prime is a controlled constant. Only the noun varied. ARM B (no relational clause) made no cross-image statement at all: KIN-ABSENT. ARM C (construction frame) named three shared properties and then explicitly denied sameness - 'a distinct construction method not seen in the second image', 'a different engineering principle': KIN-SPECIFIC-ONLY. ARM A (motif frame) asserted 'Both images share a fundamental motif of creating a sense of the divine or celestial': KIN-HEDGED, almost word for word the hedge HW-L4 section 4.5 pre-registered. Pre-registered cell 1 obtained: THE VOCABULARY DRIVES IT. A6's residual exposure is REAL and A6's delta must be re-derived before it runs. Anthropomorphism watch ABSENT in all three arms for both images; HW-L4's four pre-registered face predictions did not occur; contamination rule not triggered. External claims: 13 rows, 0 frame-contradicts, 0 stimulus-contradicts, 6 identity-reaching - and the declared confound was REFUTED in the informative direction, since the FLOOR arm produced the most attribution and the only two monument names while arm A named none, prospectively corroborating the cycle-6 audit's question-type clustering. Budget question settled: arm B prompt_tokens 3649 for two images, about 1794 tokens per image - BOTH prior estimates were wrong, the 2400 rule over-cautious and the 1000 figure extrapolated from 007 an underestimate; use ~1800/image for the rest of the program. The section 6 stop condition was honoured mechanically: arm B was captured and inspected before C and A were sent, so a reading over 6900 would have halted with two calls unspent.
